problem id: 100e280a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10000010 -> 00011000
  00101100 -> 10110101
  01011110 -> 01110011
  11110111 -> 11000010
  10101100 -> 10100101
  10000111 -> 00001100
  01111000 -> 11101111
  11001100 -> 00101001
  10111111 -> 11101011
  10001101 -> 00100101

query: 01011010
predicted answer: 01100011
